item.title: Version 0.1.5
item.description:
Version 0.1.5.
- Fixes scrolling in the Switcher settings tab so all window-action and movement shortcuts are accessible. - Starts local voice capture immediately and preserves more leading audio so the beginning of dictation is not cut off. - Makes Groq and Local switching explicit and race-safe, without silently falling back or keeping the unselected local transcriber loaded. - Explains the approximately 600 MB local model download before switching and keeps the current provider selected until the download succeeds. - Adds an option to purge the downloaded local speech model and safely returns transcription to Groq when needed.
